name: every PCI-DSS rule in the pre-authored finance-industry namespace cites the authoritative pcisecuritystandards URL from the C-13 registry
command: grep -c 'docs_url: https://www.pcisecuritystandards.org/document_library/' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/finance-industry/pci-dss.yaml" | awk '$1 >= 3 { exit 0 } { exit 1 }' && echo pci-dss-cites-pci 1>&2
